hooks.commandWindows: python -c "import pathlib, subprocess; p = pathlib.Path(subprocess.check_output(['git', 'rev-parse', '--show-toplevel'], text=True).strip()) / '.codex/hooks/checkpoint_session_hook.py'; exec(compile(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'), str(p), 'exec'))"
